response.justification: The candidate has relevant experience in AI infrastructure and developer tooling, with a strong background in full-stack development and cloud platforms. They have worked with TypeScript and Node.js, and have experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators.
strengths: Experience with AI infrastructure and developer tooling
concerns: No direct mention of experience with vector databases or RAG architectures
No explicit mention of experience with major cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, Azure)
Limited information on experience with LLM performance metrics and optimization techniques

key_factors.factor: Lack of direct experience with key technologies
